title: Handle missing system dependencies (ripgrep)
description: The agent failed several times to use `search_text` because `rg` was not installed on the host machine. Instead of reporting it and stopping, the agent attempted to manually read files in a loop without ensuring those files were actually relevant or providing full context.
proposed_change: Add a 'System Dependency Recovery' section to the recovery playbook. If a tool fails due to a missing binary (FileNotFoundError), the agent must: 1. Immediately report the current environment deficiency to the user; 2. Identify if there alternative tools available (e.g., `grep` or manually listing directories); 3. Stop attempting the same failed operation with an alternative that provides insufficient context (like reading a single file multiple times) unless explicitly directed by the user.

fitness.notes: Directly addresses the '撞牆' (Hitting the Wall) principle in AGENTX.md by preventing repetitive failed attempts to recover.
